summary: TemaDom Phase 3 Gallery Features - Complete testing of published-projects endpoints, Gallery page, and AI Designer publish functionality. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI checks passed.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a React development warning related to dynamic content wrapping, not affecting functionality

backend: ✅ GET /api/published-projects - returns list with pagination (3 projects found)
✅ PDF design returns 404 for nonexistent project
✅ PDF survey returns 404 for nonexistent project
frontend: ✅ Gallery has room type filter dropdown
✅ Gallery shows 3 project cards with stats (likes, comments, views, rating)
✅ Gallery detail page loads with project info
✅ Detail page has Design PDF download button
✅ Detail page has Survey PDF (Количествена сметка) download button
✅ Detail page has Comment input and submit button
✅ Detail page shows materials table with prices
✅ AI Designer page has 'Публикувай проекта' button (shows after generation)

critical_code_review_comments: Auth properly enforced for POST/like/comment/rate endpoints
PDF generation working for both design and survey downloads
Gallery page properly implements filtering by room_type, style, and sorting
Before/After tabs correctly display original and AI-generated images
Rating system (1-5 stars) with average calculation working
Comments system working with user info display
Likes toggle working with count tracking
All text in Bulgarian as specified
seed_data_creation: 3 sample published projects exist in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Gallery features fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/published-projects (list with filters), GET /api/published-projects/{id} (detail), POST /api/published-projects (publish - auth), POST /{id}/like (toggle - auth), POST /{id}/comment (add - auth), POST /{id}/rate (1-5 - auth), GET /{id}/pdf/design (PDF), GET /{id}/pdf/survey (PDF). Frontend: /gallery page with filters, /gallery/{id} detail page with comments/likes/rating/PDF buttons. AI Designer has 'Публикувай проекта' button that appears after AI generation.

published_projects_list.details: GET /api/published-projects returns paginated list with filters (room_type, style, sort_by)

published_project_detail.details: GET /api/published-projects/{id} returns full project with before_images, after_images, materials, comments, ratings

publish_project_auth.details: POST /api/published-projects requires authentication and validates title, before_images, after_images

like_system.details: POST /api/published-projects/{id}/like toggles like and returns updated count

comment_system.details: POST /api/published-projects/{id}/comment adds comment with user info, validates text not empty

rating_system.details: POST /api/published-projects/{id}/rate accepts 1-5 stars, updates average rating

design_pdf_download.details: GET /api/published-projects/{id}/pdf/design returns PDF with before/after images

gallery_page_ui.details: /gallery page loads with filters (room_type, style, sort) and project cards

gallery_detail_ui.details: /gallery/{id} shows before/after tabs, like button, rating stars, PDF downloads, comments

navbar_gallery_link.details: Navbar has 'Галерия' link with Image icon

footer_gallery_link.details: Footer has 'Галерия проекти' link under 'За фирми'

ai_designer_publish_button.details: AI Designer page has 'Публикувай проекта' button (data-testid='publish-btn') in results step
